title: Realtime Markdown Chat App with User Avatars and Typing Indicators

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Realtime Markdown Chat App with User Avatars and Typing Indicators

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
<g transform='translate(100, 50)'>
<rect x='-100' y='-30' rx='10' width='200' height='60' fill='#C06C88'/>
<rect x='-75' y='-30' rx='10' width='150' height='60' fill='#C06C88'/>
<rect x='-50' y='-30' rx='10' width='100' height='60' fill='#C06C88'/>
<circle cx='0' cy='-20' r='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
<text x='10' y='-5' font-size='20' font-family='Arial' fill='#FFFFFF'>Username 1</text>
<text x='150' y='-5' font-size='20' font-family='Arial' fill='#FFFFFF'>Username 2</text>
<text x='300' y='-5' font-size='20' font-family='Arial' fill='#FFFFFF'>Username 3</text>
<rect x='0' y='30' rx='5' width='150' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
<rect x='160' y='30' rx='5' width='50' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
<rect x='220' y='30' rx='5' width='50' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
</g>
<rect x='60' y='80' rx='5' width='280' height='200' fill='#090a0f'/>
<rect x='10' y='200' rx='5' width='380' height='50' fill='#C06C88'/>
<text x='40' y='220' font-size='20' font-family='Arial' fill='#FFFFFF'>Message Input</text>
<text x='10' y='280' font-size='15' font-family='Arial' fill='#666666'>Markdown Chat App</text>
<g transform='translate(20, 240)'>
<circle cx='10' cy='-10' r='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
<rect x='0' y='0' rx='5' width='30' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
<text x='35' y='0' font-size='15' font-family='Arial' fill='#666666'>Typing...</text>
</g>
<path d='M 340 80 L 340 200' stroke='#C06C88' fill='none'/>
<g transform='translate(320, 80)'>
<circle cx='10' cy='-20' r='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
<rect x='0' y='0' rx='5' width='30' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
<text x='35' y='0' font-size='15' font-family='Arial' fill='#666666'>Typing...</text>
</g>
<g transform='translate(300, 180)'>
<circle cx='10' cy='-20' r='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
<rect x='0' y='0' rx='5' width='30' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
<text x='35' y='0' font-size='15' font-family='Arial' fill='#666666'>Typing...</text>
</g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must implement user avatars and typing indicators with interactive state updates

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Realtime Markdown Chat App with User Avatars and Typing Indicators

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, user avatar uploads, chat message rendering, and typing indicators.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
